item.title: She beat the sh*t out of cancer.
item.description: Breanna is 33, a mom of two a wife and my good friend. She had a 12% chance of beating this. Today she was declared Cancer free. This is the best Halloween ever.
item.dc:creator: Springchikun

item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Thursday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
just some incredible costumes.. happy halloween gang! greetings
was not wondering
mmm... cheeese
not cool
uncanny
sounds about right
yes she made a grammatical error
did anyone get to meet this legend??
no good scabs right now
mmm hmm
thems the breaks
sounds like a pretty sweet deal
accurate
jesus tap dancing christ
i guess
i've been trying to reach quite a few imgurians telepathically, is it working?
dislike
that's my time.. stay safe out there and have a great night!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: Makes so much sense! I couldn't really do my family tree as a kid either, made me feel left out... Either scrap the idea in schools or work around it!
item.description: Edit to add: I have zero fucking clue what WL means! Can anyone clarify, Google only says 'with love'.... But I really thought the point of what their saying outways not knowing WL! Lol

item.title: Trump vs The Anti-Trump

item.dc:creator: WellThereYouAre

item.title: Gotta steal them all!
item.description:
Updated my Team Rocket outfit this year. Last year I walked around and handed out my old extra pokemon cards to kids. Found out about "Trick or Trade" card boosters. Now I have a mini side puch for quick hand offs. My area was hit by Halene. This year I figured this year to hand out more cards.
My hidden stash of stole-er I mean legit pokemon for those pesky trainers to get! Got like 150 boosters shoved up in this puppy!
It lights up! Last minute build. Literally finished it 10mins ago. Started building it yesterday. Also make it easier for cars to see me. Don't wanna get hit again.
To get in the pokemon mood I tried my had at a DIY phone case. It's ugly, bulky and didn't turn out how i wanted. Dang it was it fun to do and I have ideas on how to improve! Got some cherry leftover from a jobsite that is phone size.....
My very own Bidoof - Cinnamon. She is my stress relief guinea pig.
item.dc:creator: Smoretank

item.title: I love good news like this.
item.description: Sauce: https://www.smithsonianmag.com/smart-news/two-high-schoolers-found-an-impossible-proof-for-a-2000-year-old-math-rule-then-they-discovered-nine-more-180985357/
item.dc:creator: countervail247365

item.title: My costume for work today
item.description:
I tried my best with the spider web makeup.
I got the dress glove cape and headpiece at Goodwill and then I attached the spider webs to the dress.
Happy Halloween to all you ghouls and goblins. Thank you guys for the lovely comments and upvotes. I never thought I would make the front page two days in a row it's a Halloween miracle.
item.dc:creator: killinitattheOG

item.title: They're eating the Dawgs!
item.description: Not me or my dog. Love the costume! Whoa! Woke up to the front page, wasn't expecting that! Thanks and GO VOTE! Protect freedom. Protect America. Protect democracy. VOTE BLUE THE WHOLE BALLOT THROUGH!
item.dc:creator: RocknRootRanchcuzallwegotisrocksandrootsandafewtrees

item.title: Happy Halloween from the NICU
item.description: My wife has always said if she had an October baby she wanted to dress him up as a slug lol. Well grandma pulled through and crocheted a slug costume, with bonus matching hats for mom and dad.
